'''shadhate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mulishly|mulishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mulishly|mulishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shadhate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhate|shadhate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shadhatesher|shadhatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatesherĂ«m|shadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shadhatero|shadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhateshĂ«|shadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhateshĂ«m|shadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishadhatero|gokishadhatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhateshĂ«|gokishadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhateshĂ«m|gokishadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshadhankerom|goshadhankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhankeshĂ«|goshadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhankeshĂ«m|goshadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshadhankeya|goshadhankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shadhaterom|shadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatemu|shadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shadhateya|shadhateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishadhaterom|gokishadhaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatemu|gokishadhatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishadhateya|gokishadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhadhate|shadhadhate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shadhadhatesher|shadhadhatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadhatesherĂ«m|shadhadhatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shadhadhatero|shadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhadhateshĂ«|shadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadhateshĂ«m|shadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishadhadhatero|gokishadhadhatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhadhateshĂ«|gokishadhadhateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadhateshĂ«m|gokishadhadhateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshadhadhankerom|goshadhadhankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhadhankeshĂ«|goshadhadhankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhadhankeshĂ«m|goshadhadhankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshadhadhankeya|goshadhadhankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shadhadhaterom|shadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhadhatemu|shadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shadhadhateya|shadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishadhadhaterom|gokishadhadhaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhadhatemu|gokishadhadhatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishadhadhateya|gokishadhadhateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠte|shĂŠdhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠtesher|shĂŠdhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m|shĂŠdhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠtero|shĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|shĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|shĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdhĂŠtero|gokishĂŠdhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«|gokishĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokishĂŠdhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshĂŠdhĂŠnkerom|goshĂŠdhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«|goshĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goshĂŠdhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshĂŠdhĂŠnkeya|goshĂŠdhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠterom|shĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠtemu|shĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shĂŠdhĂŠteya|shĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdhĂŠterom|gokishĂŠdhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdhĂŠtemu|gokishĂŠdhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishĂŠdhĂŠteya|gokishĂŠdhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:shafdhafte|shafdhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:shafdhaftesher|shafdhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafdhaftesherĂ«m|shafdhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafdhaftero|shafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafdhafteshĂ«|shafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafdhafteshĂ«m|shafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafdhaftero|gokishafdhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafdhafteshĂ«|gokishafdhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafdhafteshĂ«m|gokishafdhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goshafdhafnkerom|goshafdhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafdhafnkeshĂ«|goshafdhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafdhafnkeshĂ«m|goshafdhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goshafdhafnkeya|goshafdhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:shafdhafterom|shafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafdhaftemu|shafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:shafdhafteya|shafdhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokishafdhafterom|gokishafdhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafdhaftemu|gokishafdhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokishafdhafteya|gokishafdhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
